Failed-axis ledger blocks stacker public regression, OTTO forced public-negative follow-up, and current-best ALS independent strict failure as repeat candidates.

Log exists and is warning-dominated; the inspected end still contains only repeated invalid-value warnings through line 40121, with no final metric/report. The broad fine-grid was not relaunched.
Required expanded jackknife JSON is absent.
Required expanded jackknife Markdown is absent.
Log has 12 lines, processes seed42/seed7, begins seed123, then stops after invalid-value warnings without a final report.

Latest prior cron status classified the 17:15 KST OpenCode run as NO_SAFE_AXIS, with no probe launched, no new submission CSV, clean safety flags, and no separate relevant process.
Latest prior OpenCode loop returned NO_SAFE_AXIS, reviewed the same stalled/weak/closed families, and launched no probe.

Diagnostic atlas rows show same-panel ALS/residual gains, including top row mean +0.0017336800693471914, min +0.0011002200440087817, 3/3 positive, p=0.0008771610341625039, but report verdict requires independent confirmation.

Pre-registered independent ALS row fails strict gate: mean +0.0008001600320064103, min -0.0003000600120024455, positive 2/3, fixes/breaks 504/456, p=0.12924401684163647. Best diagnostic row on the fresh panel is below +0.0015 mean and not a pre-registered independent pass.

Direct rg and ast-grep inspected script surfaces for metrics, to_csv writes, subprocess launches, candidate/submission paths, and submit-capable code. Surfaces are either validation diagnostics already covered, full-test/candidate materializers, submission-capable/autonomous runner code, or closed/quarantined model families; no fresh bounded safe axis was identified.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.axis: Genuinely new validation-label-free base model family not already implemented locally
ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.rationale: This remains the only broad direction not immediately closed by ledgers, but this run found no concrete bounded local surface with enough evidence to justify a validation-only probe. Candidate generation/training would be too large or would overlap forbidden/full-test materializer surfaces.
Same-panel atlas is attractive but independent confirmation failed strict gate. Relaunching retunes would repeat a closed same-family surface.
Independent validation failed strict gate and forced public score 0.77815 did not beat current best 0.77825.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.rationale: UserKNN remains warning-dominated STALLED_INCOMPLETE; jackknife expanded is absent/incomplete and smoke top fails strict gate. Broad relaunch would be a duplicate.

ranked_next_axis_hypotheses.rationale: Would risk candidate/full-test CSV creation, files under submissions/, or Kaggle submission paths, violating this run's hard safety contract.

why_not_candidate: No fresh independent validation-only axis satisfied the strict gate or justified a bounded launch. The strongest same-panel diagnostic required independent confirmation; its pre-registered independent confirmation had mean Δ +0.0008001600320064103, min Δ -0.0003000600120024455, only 2/3 positive splits, and p=0.12924401684163647. The best fresh-panel diagnostic was still below the +0.0015 mean gate and not pre-registered. UserKNN and jackknife are stalled/weak; OTTO, ALS/rankblend retunes, DNS, temporal, exact-K, hours-confidence, SL@K-lite, last-slot, semantic/text, capacity/frontier, and public-tested rankblend variants are closed, quarantined, duplicate, public-negative, or forbidden. No validation probe was launched.
